title: defect inventory
description: Triaged defect list (bug-bash, bug-hunt, crash triage output). Severity vocabulary is the industry standard: P0=Cat-A game-breaking (blocks alpha), P1=critical, P2=major, P3=minor, P4=polish. The rc gate requires 100% P0-P1 fixed, >90% P2, >85% P3.

repro.description: deterministic reproduction steps or the automation test that triggers it

verified_by.description: how the fix was independently verified (re-driven repro, not the fixer's word)

counts.description: totals by severity — what gate waves read
